_header.purpose: PostToolUse hook fragment for self-correction loop (ruff/eslint/tsc)
_header.consumes: Claude Code Write/Edit events on language-matching files
_header.produces: validator stderr injected into next turn as tool-result error

hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.py) ruff check --quiet "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" ;; *.ts|*.tsx) tsc --noEmit && eslint --max-warnings 0 "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" ;; esac
